plan_summary.primary_goal: Generate robust, attributable evidence on 4DWW productivity and equity to inform national labor reform.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests whether the INR 2,000 crore envelope and ring-fenced 10% contingency cover aggregate stress-test shocks, whether budget allocations to the formal track and productivity grants are sufficient for the targeted cohort, and whether opt-in, SME-share, and post-incentive productivity retention clear their stated thresholds.

key_values.label: Total program budget
key_values.comment: Headline budget envelope governing all formal and informal track spending across 48 months.

key_values.label: Formal track allocation share
key_values.comment: Share of total budget directed to the formal sector 4DWW pilot track.

key_values.label: Contingency fund share
key_values.comment: Ring-fenced contingency reserve as fraction of total budget; the only buffer named for absorbing stated stress-test shocks.

key_values.label: Productivity grants share of incentive budget
key_values.comment: Fraction of formal-track incentive budget routed to performance-linked productivity grants vs. tax credits.
key_values.source_text: 80% of incentive budget allocated to productivity grants

key_values.label: SME participation target share
key_values.comment: Required SME share of participating companies; cohort selection criterion gating evidence representativeness.
key_values.source_text: 50% of participating companies must be SMEs

key_values.label: Voluntary opt-in threshold
key_values.comment: Minimum voluntary opt-in participation rate required through the first 24 months to keep cohorts representative.
key_values.source_text: Voluntary opt-in participation rates must remain above 75%

key_values.label: Productivity retention threshold post-incentive
key_values.comment: Required sustained productivity (as share of baseline) six months post-incentive expiry; below this national ROI is reduced.
key_values.source_text: If productivity retention falls below 95% six months post-incentive expiry, then national ROI projections are reduced.

key_values.label: Aggregate stress-test shock cost
key_values.comment: Plausible aggregate INR-cost realisation if multiple risks materialise; base sums plausible portion of regulatory delay, data-integrity loss, incentive overrun, and political crisis costs.
key_values.source_text: Delay INR 150-300 cr; data integrity INR 50 cr; incentive overrun INR 300 cr; political crisis INR 10 cr.

derived_questions.question: Does the realised SME share of participating companies clear the 50% mandate?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Failure invalidates the administrative-simplicity test and the evidence base for national rollout.

derived_questions.question: Does realised voluntary opt-in clear the 75% threshold in the first 24 months?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Falling below 75% worsens selection bias and undermines generalisability.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realised SME share of participating companies
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tests whether the cohort actually clears the 50% SME mandate.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Estimate from observed MOU sign-ups across selected pilot states; bound from sector size distribution.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realised voluntary opt-in participation rate
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tests whether the 75% opt-in threshold for representativeness holds.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Estimate from comparable voluntary policy pilots in Indian formal sector; bound around target.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realised post-incentive productivity retention
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tests whether sustained productivity clears the 95% retention threshold six months post-incentive.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Use survival analysis on cohorts; bound around 50% attrition of grant-driven efficiency (review-stated assumption).

recommended_first_calculations.label: Formal track budget
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Sets the spending envelope for the formal sector pilot, which the incentive grant pool draws from.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Contingency reserve
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Quantifies the only ring-fenced buffer against stress-test shocks; primary input to viability gate.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Contingency buffer after aggregate shock
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the ring-fenced reserve absorbs realised aggregate shocks; positive = pass.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Productivity grants pool
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Sizes the performance-grant pool that drives adoption behaviour and post-incentive dependency risk.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Productivity retention margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether sustained productivity clears the 95% post-incentive threshold; positive = pass.

unmodelled_gates.label: State Labor Department MOU and joint sign-off
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Centralised enforcement of quarterly decision gates requires binding co-chair sign-off by State Labour Departments; without it the PMO cannot enforce KPI thresholds or rollback.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Centralised enforcement is blocked, decision gates stall, and the evidence pipeline becomes politically inadmissible.

unmodelled_gates.label: Executive notification on overtime definitions
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: The pilot proceeds via executive notification rather than legislative amendment; legal interpretation must permit 40-hour overtime treatment for the initial 24 months.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Non-compliance challenges from non-participating firms halt portions of the formal cohort and trigger unplanned legal review.

unmodelled_gates.label: Audit admissibility under State Labour litigation
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Litigation could rule third-party audit findings inadmissible, invalidating the entire evidence mandate independent of any KPI margin the model tests.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: The INR 2,000 crore evidence mandate is invalidated; national policy recommendation cannot be supported.
